titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to Miscellaneous Financial Materials Concerning Natural Gas Companies Operating in the North American West
Miscellaneous Financial Materials Concerning Natural Gas Companies Operating in the North American West
titlestmt.author: by Ellen Ellickson and Caroline Wilcox Reul

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 10198199.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday December 29, 2017 at 15:44

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous financial materials concerning natural gas companies operating in the North American West

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: This collection, compiled by William H. Brown, contains a variety of financial documents concerning natural gas companies operating in the North American West. Examples of these documents include company correspondence, company profiles and newsletters, consumer information, maps, reprints of newspaper articles, journal articles, obituaries, statements and addresses of company officers, letters and notices to the stockholders, reports, balance sheets, prospectuses, bond and debenture selling agreements, subscription agreements, proxy statements, stock and bond offerings, mortgage and trust indentures, and plans and agreements of re-organization. While all of these documents are represented in the collection, they are not all represented by each company.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition note
acqinfo.p: Most of these financial materials were part of a collection acquired by Yale in 1922 from William H. Brown of West Haven, Conn. The collection, initially called the William H. Brown Statistical Library, numbered some 23,000 documents and covered the years 1890 to 1917. The collection was merged with similar materials already in the University Library and later expanded by gifts from Brown and others to become what is now known as the William H. Brown Collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: This collection, compiled by William H. Brown, contains a variety of financial documents concerning natural gas companies operating in the North American West. Examples of these documents include company correspondence, company profiles and newsletters, consumer information, maps, reprints of newspaper articles, journal articles, obituaries, statements and addresses of company officers, letters and notices to the stockholders, reports, balance sheets, prospectuses, bond and debenture selling agreements, subscription agreements, proxy statements, stock and bond offerings, mortgage and trust indentures, and plans and agreements of re-organization. While all of these documents are represented in the collection, they are not all represented by each company.

arrangement.head: Arrangement note
arrangement.p: Files are arranged alphabetically by company name.

did.unittitle: Colorado Springs Light, Heat and Power Company
Denver Gas and Electric Light Company
Los Angeles Gas and Electric Corporation
Missouri Gas Company of Kansas City, Mo.
St. Louis Gas and Coke Corporation
San Diego Consolidated Gas and Electric Company
San Francisco Gas and Electric Company
San Joaquin Light and Power Corporation
Southern Counties Gas Company of California
